memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB rather than the source of truth.
Slack should act as a strict memory intake agent.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while saturating performance.
